calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Leave To File Against City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Aug-28-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Leave To File Against City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Continued To Sep-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Robert A. Carichoff of Carichoff Law Group, P.C., Tel. No. 1-916-471-6504
appearing for the Petitioner by Telephone appearance;
Atty. Susan J. Kawala, Deputy City Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-554-3827
appearing forthe Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D; Petitioner Patrina Hall's petition for an order relieving her from her failure to present a timely Government Code claim to respondent City and County of San Francisco is continued for the last time to September 17, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept 302. Supplemental Evidence to be provided by Petitioner on or before August 24, 2018. The City to file a Supplemental reply by September 7, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Leave To File Against City And County Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Continued To Aug-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Carichoff, Esq. 915-471-6504 for PETITIONER PATRINA HALL through Court Call.
Susan Kawala, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 for Respondent City and County of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PATRINA HALL's Petition For Leave To File Against City And County Of San Francisco.

Continued to August 2, 2018 at 9:30 am. Petitioner to file a declaration from Ms. Hall by 7/25/18. Respondent's Supplemental Opposition is due by 7/31/18.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
